title: ArtifactCacheRecord
description: A content-addressed cache entry recording a locally-stored NLBoot artifact with its origin, digest, status, and platform binding.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

artifactKind.description: Semantic role of the cached artifact in the boot chain.

contentHash.description: Content-addressed digest of the artifact, e.g. "sha256:abc123...".

status.description: Current status of the cache entry.

cachedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the artifact was written to the local cache.

platform.description: Target platform this artifact is intended for, or null if platform-agnostic.

sourceUrl.description: URL from which the artifact was originally fetched, if applicable.

sourceRef.description: Optional URN reference to the release set or manifest that produced this artifact.

sizeBytes.description: Size of the cached artifact in bytes.

expiresAt.description: Optional ISO 8601 date-time after which this cache entry may be evicted.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes about this cache entry.
